site.name: Best Subjects
site.tagline: The subjects that matter most, taught well.

landing.hero: Your child deserves to learn the best subjects.
landing.heroSub: Economics, civics, business, logic, and rhetoric shape every major decision in life. Money, career, voting, relationships, arguments. Most people figure them out the hard way, or never. Your child doesn't have to.
landing.feature1: Age-appropriate live workbooks in plain language
landing.feature2: Built-in AI tutor for every lesson
landing.step1: Start with free lessons in economics, civics, business, logic, or rhetoric. No credit card required.
landing.step2: Each lesson takes about 15–20 minutes and uses plain language with examples from a kid's world.
landing.step3: Your child can ask questions anytime. The built-in AI tutor explains concepts in an age-appropriate way without giving answers away.
landing.step4: Students write real answers and get helpful feedback. Not just right or wrong, but guidance that helps them understand.
landing.tutorTitle: An AI tutor that helps your child understand
landing.tutorBody: Every live workbook includes a built-in AI tutor that knows the subject and the specific lesson. It explains concepts, answers questions, gives examples, and responds to your child's written answers. The tutor is designed to guide, not shortcut. It helps your child reason through the material without simply giving the answer away.
landing.pricingBody: Each live workbook has free lessons so you can try it before buying anything. No credit card required. When you want the full workbook, buy it once and keep it. No monthly subscription. No ongoing fees.
landing.languageTitle: Learn in the language that works best for your child
landing.languageBody: Lessons, quizzes, AI tutor help, and the entire website are available in 60+ languages, so your child can learn in the language that feels most natural.
landing.ctaSub: Create a free account to get started. Browse the catalog anytime, no sign-up needed.

catalog.title: Live Workbooks

catalog.introNoCount: Read at your own pace. Each live workbook includes a built-in tutor and graded exercises.
catalog.search: Search by title, author, or topic...
catalog.noResults: No live workbooks match your filters.

bookDetail.freePreviewNote: First {count} lessons free. Adds to your library so you can pick up later.
bookDetail.unlocksGreatMindsHint: You've unlocked conversations with these historical figures.

library.subtitle: Pick up where you left off, or <browse>browse the catalog</browse> for something new.
library.emptyHint: Every live workbook has a free preview. Add one to your library to get started.

lesson.answerPlaceholder: Write your answer in your own words...
lesson.tutorHintFull: Ask anything about this lesson. The tutor won't just hand you the answers.

lesson.introReadyHint: Ready to get started on Lesson 1?

lesson.tutorUnavailable: The tutor is unavailable right now. Try again in a moment.

paywall.subtitle: You've reached the end of the free preview. Get the full workbook to keep going.

account.title: My Account
account.subtitle: Manage your profile and what the tutor remembers about you.
account.name: Name
account.noPurchases: You haven't purchased any workbooks yet.
account.memoriesTitle: What the tutor remembers about you
account.memoriesHint: The tutor picks these up from chat and uses them to tailor future replies. Delete anything that's wrong or out of date.
account.memoriesEmpty: Nothing saved yet. Tell the tutor your preferences in any lesson chat (e.g. "I like Star Wars examples", "keep replies short") and they'll show up here.

help.title: Help
help.subtitle: Everything you need to know about using Best Subjects.
help.browsingStep1: Tap "Browse live workbooks" in the top navigation to see the full catalog.
help.browsingStep2: Use the search bar to find workbooks by title, author, or topic. Use the subject dropdown to filter by subject area.
help.browsingStep3: Tap any workbook to see its full description, table of contents, and which Great Minds it unlocks.
help.buyingStep1: Every workbook has free preview lessons you can try before buying. Tap "Start free preview" on any workbook page to add it to your library.
help.buyingStep2: When you're ready to buy, tap the Buy button on the workbook page. You'll be taken to a secure Stripe checkout. Each workbook is a one-time purchase - no subscriptions.
help.buyingStep3: After purchase, the full workbook appears in your library immediately. You own it forever.
help.libraryStep1: Your library shows every workbook you've started or purchased, sorted by most recently accessed.
help.libraryStep2: Each workbook card shows your progress and a Continue button to pick up where you left off.
help.libraryStep3: Inside a workbook, read the lesson, then answer the questions in your own words. The AI tutor grades your answers and gives feedback. Ask the tutor anything if you get stuck.
help.accountStep1: Tap your avatar in the upper right corner, then tap "My Account" to see your profile and purchase history.
help.accountStep2: The Purchases section shows every workbook you've bought, when you bought it, and how much you paid.
help.accountStep3: The tutor memories section shows what the AI tutor has learned about your preferences. You can delete any memory that's wrong or out of date.
help.supportBody: If you have questions, run into a problem, or need help with a purchase, email us. We'll get back to you as soon as we can.
